languages.text: "Прошу простить моего коллегу за излишне объемную формулировку, позвольте мне представить укороченную версию". {n}Техножрец задумчиво прищуривается.{/n} "Думаю, оптимальная трактовка такова: дипломатические обязанности, торговые сделки разного рода, включающие торговлю данными, а также своевременное выдворение мирян из зоны интересов Эксплораторов".

"Please forgive my colleague's overly wordy phrasing, allow me to present a more concise alternative." {n}The Tech-Priest narrows his eyes in thought.{/n} "I believe the optimal interpretation is as follows: diplomatic duties, commercial ventures including the exchange of data, and the timely expulsion of the laity from the Explorators' sectors of interest."
languages.original_text: "Прошу простить моего коллегу за излишне объемную формулировку, позвольте мне представить укороченную версию". {n}Техножрец задумчиво прищуривается.{/n} "Думаю, оптимальная трактовка такова: дипломатические обязанности, торговые сделки разного рода, включающие торговлю данными, а также своевременное выдворение мирян из зоны интересов Эксплораторов".

traits.locale_text: "Please forgive my colleague's overly wordy phrasing, allow me to present a more concise alternative." {n}The Tech-Priest narrows his eyes thoughtfully.{/n} "I believe the optimal interpretation is as follows: diplomatic duties, commercial ventures including the exchange of data, and the timely expulsion of the laity from the Explorators' sectors of interest."

"Please forgive my colleague's overly wordy phrasing, allow me to present a more concise alternative." {n}The Tech-Priest narrows his eyes thoughtfully.{/n} "I believe the optimal interpretation is as follows: diplomatic duties, commercial ventures including the exchange of data, and the timely expulsion of the laity from the Explorators' sectors of interest."

"Please forgive my colleague's overly wordy phrasing, allow me to present a more concise alternative." {n}The Tech-Priest narrows his eyes in thought.{/n} "I believe the optimal interpretation is as follows: diplomatic duties, commercial ventures including the exchange of data, and the timely expulsion of the laity from the Explorators' sectors of interest."

"Please forgive my colleague's overly wordy phrasing, allow me to present a more concise alternative." {n}The Tech-Priest narrows his eyes in thought.{/n} "I believe the optimal interpretation is as follows: diplomatic duties, commercial ventures including the exchange of data, and the timely expulsion of the laity from the Explorators' sectors of interest."

languages.text: «Perdone la locuacidad de mi colega y permita que presente una alternativa más concisa». {n}El tecnosacerdote, pensativo, entrecierra los ojos.{/n} «Creo que la interpretación óptima sería la siguiente: labores diplomáticas, acciones comerciales, incluyendo el intercambio de datos, y la expulsión puntual de laicos de los sectores de interés para los exploradores».
languages.original_text: "Please forgive my colleague's overly wordy phrasing, allow me to present a more concise alternative." {n}The Tech-Priest narrows his eyes in thought.{/n} "I believe the optimal interpretation is as follows: diplomatic duties, commercial ventures including the exchange of data, and the timely expulsion of the laity from the Explorators' sectors of interest."

traits.locale_text: «Perdone la locuacidad de mi colega y permita que presente una alternativa más concisa». {n}El tecnosacerdote, pensativo, entrecierra los ojos.{/n} «Creo que la interpretación óptima sería la siguiente: labores diplomáticas, acciones comerciales, incluyendo el intercambio de datos, y la expulsión puntual de laicos de los sectores de interés para los exploradores».

languages.text: “请原谅我那同僚过于冗长的措辞，让我给出一个更简洁的版本。”{n}技术神甫若有所思地眯起眼。{/n}“我认为最准确的概括如下：外交事务、包含数据交换的商业活动，以及及时将教外人士清出开拓者所关注的区域。”
languages.original_text: "Please forgive my colleague's overly wordy phrasing, allow me to present a more concise alternative." {n}The Tech-Priest narrows his eyes in thought.{/n} "I believe the optimal interpretation is as follows: diplomatic duties, commercial ventures including the exchange of data, and the timely expulsion of the laity from the Explorators' sectors of interest."

traits.locale_text: “请原谅我那同僚过于冗长的措辞，让我给出一个更简洁的版本。”{n}技术神甫若有所思地眯起眼。{/n}“我认为最准确的概括如下：外交事务、包含数据交换的商业活动，以及及时将教外人士清出开拓者所关注的区域。”

languages.text: "Bitte entschuldigt den Wortschwall meines Kollegen und gestattet mir eine etwas knappere Erklärung." {n}Der Techpriester kneift nachdenklich die Augen zusammen.{/n} "Ich glaube, die optimale Übersetzung lautet wie folgt: diplomatische Pflichten, wirtschaftliche Beziehungen einschließlich des Austauschs von Daten sowie die Vertreibung von Laien aus den für die Exploratoren interessanten Sektoren."
languages.original_text: "Please forgive my colleague's overly wordy phrasing, allow me to present a more concise alternative." {n}The Tech-Priest narrows his eyes in thought.{/n} "I believe the optimal interpretation is as follows: diplomatic duties, commercial ventures including the exchange of data, and the timely expulsion of the laity from the Explorators' sectors of interest."

traits.locale_text: "Bitte entschuldigt den Wortschwall meines Kollegen und gestattet mir eine etwas knappere Erklärung." {n}Der Techpriester kneift nachdenklich die Augen zusammen.{/n} "Ich glaube, die optimale Übersetzung lautet wie folgt: diplomatische Pflichten, wirtschaftliche Beziehungen einschließlich des Austauschs von Daten sowie die Vertreibung von Laien aus den für die Exploratoren interessanten Sektoren."

languages.text: « Veuillez excuser les formules excessivement verbeuses de mon collègue et permettez-moi de résumer la chose de manière plus concise. » {n}Le technoprêtre plisse les yeux dans un effort de concentration.{/n} « Voilà, à mon sens, l'interprétation optimale : missions diplomatiques, opérations commerciales incluant l'échange de données et éviction opportune des profanes dans les secteurs d'intérêt des explorators. »
languages.original_text: "Please forgive my colleague's overly wordy phrasing, allow me to present a more concise alternative." {n}The Tech-Priest narrows his eyes in thought.{/n} "I believe the optimal interpretation is as follows: diplomatic duties, commercial ventures including the exchange of data, and the timely expulsion of the laity from the Explorators' sectors of interest."

traits.locale_text: « Veuillez excuser les formules excessivement verbeuses de mon collègue et permettez-moi de résumer la chose de manière plus concise. » {n}Le technoprêtre plisse les yeux dans un effort de concentration.{/n} « Voilà, à mon sens, l'interprétation optimale : missions diplomatiques, opérations commerciales incluant l'échange de données et éviction opportune des profanes dans les secteurs d'intérêt des explorators. »

languages.text: "Lütfen meslektaşımın aşırı kelime kalabalığı yapan ifadelerini bağışlayın, daha özlü bir alternatif sunmama izin verin." {n}Tekno Rahip, düşünceli bir şekilde gözlerini kısıyor.{/n} "En iyi yorumun şu olduğuna inanıyorum: Diplomatik görevler, veri alışverişi de dâhil olmak üzere ticari girişimler ve ruhban olmayanların Kâşiflerin ilgi alanlarından zamanında çıkarılması."
languages.original_text: "Please forgive my colleague's overly wordy phrasing, allow me to present a more concise alternative." {n}The Tech-Priest narrows his eyes in thought.{/n} "I believe the optimal interpretation is as follows: diplomatic duties, commercial ventures including the exchange of data, and the timely expulsion of the laity from the Explorators' sectors of interest."

traits.locale_text: "Lütfen meslektaşımın aşırı kelime kalabalığı yapan ifadelerini bağışlayın, daha özlü bir alternatif sunmama izin verin." {n}Tekno Rahip, düşünceli bir şekilde gözlerini kısıyor.{/n} "En iyi yorumun şu olduğuna inanıyorum: Diplomatik görevler, veri alışverişi de dâhil olmak üzere ticari girişimler ve ruhban olmayanların Kâşiflerin ilgi alanlarından zamanında çıkarılması."

languages.text: 「同僚の冗長な言い回しはご容赦ください。より簡潔な代替案を提示させていただきます。」{n}テクプリストは考えにふけり、目を細める。{/n}「最適な解釈は次のとおりだと考えます。外交任務、データ交換を含む商業活動、そして探査者たちが関心を持つ分野から一般市民を迅速に排除すること。」
languages.original_text: "Please forgive my colleague's overly wordy phrasing, allow me to present a more concise alternative." {n}The Tech-Priest narrows his eyes in thought.{/n} "I believe the optimal interpretation is as follows: diplomatic duties, commercial ventures including the exchange of data, and the timely expulsion of the laity from the Explorators' sectors of interest."

traits.locale_text: 「同僚の冗長な言い回しはご容赦ください。より簡潔な代替案を提示させていただきます。」{n}テクプリストは考えにふけり、目を細める。{/n}「最適な解釈は次のとおりだと考えます。外交任務、データ交換を含む商業活動、そして探査者たちが関心を持つ分野から一般市民を迅速に排除すること。」
